action.description:
Introduced by Senators Ratcliff, Spreitzer, Carpenter, Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, Larson and Drake; 
cosponsored by Representatives Snodgrass, Neubauer, Cruz, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Stroud, Udell, Clancy, Arney, Bare, Moore Omokunde, Subeck, Anderson, Joers, Palmeri, Madison, Prado, Roe, McCarville, Vining, DeSmidt, Brown, Emerson, Miresse, Sinicki and Andraca
